subcodes.title: Lawh-i-'Ustad Husayn-i-Khayyat
subcodes.first_line: ...The station of assurance is greater in degree than that of mere faith. It is the station denoted by “that they should add faith upon faith.”
subcodes.first_line_orig: مقام اطمینان اعظم درجه بر ایمانست لیزدادوا ایمانا فوق ایمانهم هر چند حضرت ابراهیم
subcodes.subjects: @degrees of faith; certitude, @fire and light; fire and water, @soul; spirit after death, @Abraham; Isaac; Ishmael, @spiritual transformation
